pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for Java 17 instead of 21 if the property is not updated to match the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processor conflicts.
pom.xml.why_exists: MapStruct and Lombok may conflict during compilation without the binding, leading to missing getter/setter methods in generated code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace source/target configuration with release configuration in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target is deprecated in newer Java versions; release is the standard for cross-compilation and module path handling in Java 9+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding to annotation processor paths in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Annotation processing will fail or produce incorrect code if the binding is not on the processor path alongside Lombok and MapStruct.

src/main/java/com/workouts/myworkouts/se.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Data JPA method getOne with getReferenceById to align with Spring Boot 3.x API changes.
src/main/java/com/workouts/myworkouts/se.why_exists: The method getOne() was removed in Spring Data JPA 3.x (required by Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compilation error.
